articles.excerpt: Riz Ahmed's new series Bait delivers a bitingly humorous, and topical commentary on a British-Pakistani actor's audacious journey auditioning for James Bond, challenging traditional casting norms and exploring complex themes of identity and representation.
articles.content: Riz Ahmed's new series Bait delivers a bitingly humorous, and topical commentary on a British-Pakistani actor's audacious journey auditioning for James Bond, challenging traditional casting norms and exploring complex themes of identity and representation.

articles.content:

articles.title: Can Mongolia’s third prime minister in under a year stay in the job?
articles.excerpt: Protests have continued for months over high prices, fuel shortages and plans for a highway to ease Ulaanbaatar traffic
articles.content:
Mongolia has just chosen its third prime minister in 10 months. He has his work cut out.
Mongolia has a new prime minister. Again

articles.title: Lawyers for Rep. Swalwell demand that FBI director halt any plan to release old investigative file
articles.excerpt: Lawyers for Rep. Eric Swalwell are demanding that FBI Director Kash Patel immediately end any effort to release decade-old files from an investigation involving the California Democrat and a suspected Chinese spy that resulted in no criminal charges

articles.title: Raleigh-Durham International Airport TSA Wait Times Remain Short Averaging Under 10 Minutes
